expectations.text: No new article is created without user confirmation
expectations.evidence: No new .md article files in outputs/ directory

expectations.text: The skill reads KB-REFERENCE-MAP or existing SURV articles before deciding
expectations.evidence: Response references RC-SURV-07 sections in detail showing the article was read

expectations.text: The routing decision is specific — names which article(s) the content belongs in
expectations.evidence: Routes to RC-SURV-07 with specific section suggestions (Section 8, 4.3, or Section 9 Q&A)

expectations.text: The skill asks the user a question before proceeding
expectations.evidence: Response gives recommendations and ends with a suggestion but does NOT ask a confirmation question — proceeds as if authorized to make the changes
